subcodes.first_line: O thou radiant candle of the love of God! In this transient realm raise high the banner of divine knowledge, that thou mayest attain unto the eternal kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع روشن محبت الله در این ملک فانی علم عرفان برافراز تا ملک باقی یابی و
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @poems and quotation from poetry, @spiritual transformation, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @transcending the material condition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
